title: Mission to Coruscant (Clone Wars)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|mission to Coruscant}} {{Citation}} {{Mission |prev=*[[Raid on Fest]] *[[Mission to the Corellian-Perlemian Intersection]] |conc=[[Attack on Cartao]] |next= |image= |name=Mission to Coruscant |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] |objective=Destroy the terrorist network |date=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] |place=[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] |result=[[Separatist terrorist network|Terrorist network]] successfully destroyed |side1=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |side2=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] [[Separatist terrorist network|terrorist network]]† |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |ppl1=*[[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] **[[Green Watch]] *[[Omega Squad]] *[[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] *[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Bardan Jusik]] *[[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando|Null ARC]] trooper [[Ordo Skirata|N-11]] *Null ARC trooper [[Mereel Skirata|N-7]] *[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Kal Skirata]] *[[Walon Vau]] *[[Clone trooper/Legends|Trooper]] [[Corr Skirata|Corr]] *[[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] **[[Jaller Obrim]] **[[Anti-Terrorism Unit]] **[[Organized Crime Unit]] |ppl2=*97 total [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorists]] **[[Perrive]]† **[[Vinna Jiss]]† **[[Hela Madiry]]† |ppl3= |ppl4= |casual1=*No casualties suffered |casual2=*All terrorists *Vinna Jiss *Hela Madiry *Perrive |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|I want to deploy Delta and Omega on Coruscant to identify and neutralize the Sep network here, because it is here. It has to be in order to strike us so easily. And CSF doesn't have the expertise or personnel to deal with this, and there might even be someone inside the CSF passing intel to the terrorists.|Kal Skirata to Arligan Zey|''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]''}} The '''Mission to Coruscant''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] sting operation to root out a terrorist cell that had been plaguing the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|GAR]]. The mission involved a strike team comprising two [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] teams, [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta]] and [[Omega Squad]], [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando|Null ARCs]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ordo Skirata|N-11 "Ordo"]] and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Mereel Skirata|N-7 "Mereel"]], [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi Generals]] [[Bardan Jusik]] and [[Etain Tur-Mukan]], and security advisor [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] [[Kal Skirata]] and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] and ex-commando instructor [[Walon Vau]]. ==Background== {{Quote|I wasn't planning to arrest anybody. This is a shoot-to kill policy.''"
"''I wasn't aware we had one.''"
"''You haven't, so you'd better get one fast.|Kal Skirata and Arligan Zey|}} The [[Kal Skirata's strike team|strike team]], led by Skirata, worked under deep cover and outside of the usual military chain of command. In conjunction with the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]], led by captain [[Jaller Obrim]], they set about unraveling the [[Separatist terrorist network|network]] of [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] connections. In order to allow the team to operate without drawing attention, Skirata contrived to arrange an extended period of leave on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the [[41st Stormtrooper Legion|41st Elite Corps]]. This enabled the otherwise obvious commandos to hide in plain sight and blend in with the ordinary troopers, as well as giving the battle-hardened troops from the 41st a much-needed break. The team lay up at [[Qibbu's Hut/Legends|Qibbu's Hut]], an establishment run by [[Qibbu]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], who owed Skirata some credits for a job. Qibbu allowed the team to stay for free in exchange for canceling his debt to Skirata. ==The mission== The team occupied the top suite of Qibbu's Hut as their Operations House. Skirata deployed two-man teams to watch and scan the skylanes for bogies. One team, made up of [[Fi Skirata|Fi]], [[Sev/Legends|Sev]], and [[Bardan Jusik]], spotted a GAR logistics employee, [[Vinna Jiss]], who was secretly working with a [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] terrorist, delivering him explosives to bomb [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] targets. The team apprehended her and Jiss was interrogated by Walon Vau, who later killed her once she had given them all the information they needed. Ordo figured out that they had a mole in GAR logistics and switched places with Trooper [[Corr Skirata|Corr]], a clone trooper also working in the logistics department due to the loss of both his hands in active duty. Meanwhile, Kal Skirata had set up a fake gunrunning business at Qibbu's Hut, hoping that the terrorists would attempt to pick up more explosives, since their main supplier had been routed out by a TIOPS mission executed by Omega Squad. Terrorists took the bait and using [[Verpine shatter gun|Verpine sniper rifles]] and a special micro-sensor tagging material nicknamed "Dust", the team managed to tag the terrorist leader, [[Perrive]] plus five others from his network. In the meantime as Ordo was impersonating Corr, he spotted the already-dead Vinna Jiss returning to work. Next day, with the help of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] Tur-Mukan they attempted to apprehend her for later questioning. During attempt Ordo shot "resurrected" Jiss and also incapacitated [[Besany Wennen]] (one of the Supervisors at GAR logistics). Both suspects survived shooting. Once they got back to their de facto base, they discovered that Wennen had been assigned to tail Jiss, who was not a reliable employee. The "resurrected" Jiss turned out to be former ally [[Jinart]], a shape-shifting [[Gurlanin]] who had assisted Omega Squad during a [[mission to Qiilura]]. Jinart ''demanded'' that the Republic forces withdraw from her planet and in exchange she would provide information on the moles in the GAR. With this new information, plus the location of the terrorists' hideout (thanks to Dust), Skirata decided that it was time to bust-up the Separatists' operation. Skirata set up a date with Perrive to deliver the much-needed ordnance to the terrorists. Following delivery of the explosives the strike team would move in to shut down their terrorists operations. All was going well. From two moles Ordo and Mereel eliminated one in the GAR (other had "unfortunate" accident) and the team was all set and ready to go. But the mission was forced to be executed earlier then expected when CSF personnel arrested one of Perrive's men, causing the terrorists to panic. Perrive requested that Skirata make his delivery 24 hours early, which the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] mercenary agreed to. Before ending his conversation with Skirata, Perrive informed him that he would not be present for the delivery. After the conversation (via [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]) ended, Skirata informed the team that their mission was a go. While Skirata, Ordo, Mereel, and the two commando squads got into position, Etain and Walon Vau, along with Vau's pet [[Strill]] [[Lord Mirdalan]], were sent to assassinate Perrive. Using one of Skirata's [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] [[Sniper/Legends|sniper]] [[Rifle/Legends|rifles]], Vau quickly and silently disposed of the [[Jabiimi]] terrorist. Meanwhile, Skirata had made his delivery without incident and the commandos had attacked, disabling the lights with two [[PLX-1/Legends|PLX-1 missile launchers]]. The team killed fifteen out of twenty-six of the terrorists almost immediately, while the survivors retreated to a warehouse. During the ensuing firefight one of terrorists escaped back to his apartment. The surviving Separatists made a last, final gambit and attempted to trick the commandos into thinking that they were surrendering. One of the commandos, [[Darman Skirata|Darman]], was nearly killed in their attempt by a [[Flamethrower/Legends|flamethrower]], but his armor managed to protect him against the blast. During the firefight all of the terrorists were killed. Meanwhile Vau and Etain had dealt with the last terrorist who had escaped back to his apartment, and the CSF began rounding up around 90 suspected terrorists. The commandos, all relatively unharmed, retreated back to their "base", where they celebrated. The Separatist terrorist net would never recover from the blow that the commandos gave them. ==Behind the scenes== The mission was originally set 12 months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], but ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' later moved the events of ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' up to 22 BBY to account for ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' {{Mo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Misión a Coruscant (Guerras Clon) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Coruscant (Clone Wars), Mission to}} [[Category:Missions of the Clone Wars]] [[Category:Missions to Coruscant]]
